nws_forecast.name: Overnight
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly cloudy, with a low around 39. Northeast wind around 8 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Slight Chance Light Rain then Patchy Fog
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of rain between 7am and 11am, then patchy fog and a slight chance of rain between 11am and 5pm. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 46. East wind 6 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain before 11pm, then a chance of rain and a slight chance of thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy. Low around 46, with temperatures rising to around 53 overnight. South wind 7 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 52. West wind around 15 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain before 7pm, then a chance of snow between 7pm and 8pm. Partly cloudy, with a low around 29. West wind around 13 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.

nws_forecast.name: Friday
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly sunny, with a high near 44. Southwest wind 8 to 13 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Friday Night
